title: Nintendo Switch
description: Nintendo Switch and a dock for placement
body:
```
This mod adds an Nintendo Switch and a dock as a decoration 🎮
The base can be used to place a switch or stand alone
```


![The Switch placed on the TV cabinet.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb13497f1eec31afbe427a09f1b202fb781af771.jpeg)


```
Hope you like it 💛
```
